candidate.name: Broken fixture: goal-impact mode without goal_impacts

summary.headline: Deliberately broken fixture: a Mode-2 (goal-impact) report with no summary.goal_impacts. The per-Goal read IS the Mode-2 verdict, so its absence leaves the report verdict-less. report-fixtures-lint MUST flag this (exit 1).

findings.rationale: Fixture filler so the findings array is otherwise valid.
